tasks.subject: Task 1: Add flake input and package ttvd CLI
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pull TikTokDownloader from GitHub as a flake input and build it as an installable Python package (`ttvd`) with a `ttvd` CLI entry point.

**Files:**
- Modify: `flake.nix`
- Create: `pkgs/python-packages/ttvd/default.nix`
- Modify: `pkgs/default.nix`
- Modify: `index.json`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `flake.nix` contains `ttvd-src` input pointing to `JoeanAmier/TikTokDownloader`
- [ ] `nix-build . -A ttvd` succeeds
- [ ] `result/bin/ttvd` exists
- [ ] `from src.config import Settings, Parameter` works in the built env

**Verify:** `nix-build . -A ttvd && result/bin/ttvd --help`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["flake.nix", "pkgs/python-packages/ttvd/default.nix", "pkgs/default.nix", "index.json"], "verifyCommand": "nix-build . -A ttvd && result/bin/ttvd --help", "acceptanceCriteria": ["nix-build . -A ttvd succeeds", "result/bin/ttvd exists", "from src.config import Settings Parameter works in built env"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add ttvd CLI to recreational machines
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make the `ttvd` CLI available on machines where `recreational = true`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `pkgs/nixos/components/x86-rec-pkgs.nix`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `anixpkgs.ttvd` appears in `home.packages` in `x86-rec-pkgs.nix`

**Verify:** `grep -n "ttvd" pkgs/nixos/components/x86-rec-pkgs.nix`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkgs/nixos/components/x86-rec-pkgs.nix"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n ttvd pkgs/nixos/components/x86-rec-pkgs.nix", "acceptanceCriteria": ["anixpkgs.ttvd appears in x86-rec-pkgs.nix home.packages"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Reserve port 6060 for ttvd service
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Register port 6060 for the ttvd Flask service in the centralized port registry.

**Files:**
- Modify: `pkgs/nixos/service-ports.nix`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `service-ports.nix` contains `ttvd = 6060`

**Verify:** `grep ttvd pkgs/nixos/service-ports.nix`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkgs/nixos/service-ports.nix"], "verifyCommand": "grep ttvd pkgs/nixos/service-ports.nix", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ttvd = 6060 appears in service-ports.nix"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Implement Flask backend (ttvdserver.py)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build the Flask server with all routes: fetch, stream, client-download, save-to-server, list-dirs.

**Files:**
- Create: `pkgs/python-packages/flasks/ttvd/ttvdserver.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `POST /ttvd/api/fetch` with real TikTok URL returns token+title+filename
- [ ] `GET /ttvd/api/stream/<token>` returns 200 video/mp4
- [ ] `GET /ttvd/api/client-download/<token>` returns file as attachment
- [ ] `POST /ttvd/api/save-to-server` moves file to given path
- [ ] `POST /ttvd/api/list-dirs` returns path/parent/dirs

**Verify:** `python3 pkgs/python-packages/flasks/ttvd/ttvdserver.py --help`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkgs/python-packages/flasks/ttvd/ttvdserver.py"], "verifyCommand": "python3 pkgs/python-packages/flasks/ttvd/ttvdserver.py --help", "acceptanceCriteria": ["POST /ttvd/api/fetch with real TikTok URL returns token+title+filename", "GET /ttvd/api/stream/<token> returns 200 video/mp4", "GET /ttvd/api/client-download/<token> returns file as attachment", "POST /ttvd/api/save-to-server moves file to path", "POST /ttvd/api/list-dirs returns path/parent/dirs"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Implement Flask UI (index.html)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Single-page UI with URL input, Fetch button, video player, client-download button, and folder-picker modal.

**Files:**
- Create: `pkgs/python-packages/flasks/ttvd/index.html`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Page renders without JS errors
- [ ] All 5 API endpoints referenced in JS
- [ ] Video player element present
- [ ] Folder picker modal present

**Verify:** `grep -c 'api/fetch\|api/stream\|api/client-download\|api/save-to-server\|api/list-dirs' pkgs/python-packages/flasks/ttvd/index.html`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkgs/python-packages/flasks/ttvd/index.html"], "verifyCommand": "grep -c 'api/fetch\\|api/stream\\|api/client-download\\|api/save-to-server\\|api/list-dirs' pkgs/python-packages/flasks/ttvd/index.html", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Page contains all 5 API call sites", "Video player element present", "Folder picker modal present"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Create Flask Nix derivation (ttvdserver)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Package ttvdserver.py + index.html as a buildPythonPackage derivation depending on ttvd and Flask.

**Files:**
- Create: `pkgs/python-packages/flasks/ttvd/setup.py`
- Create: `pkgs/python-packages/flasks/ttvd/default.nix`
- Modify: `pkgs/default.nix`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `nix-build . -A ttvdserver` succeeds
- [ ] `result/bin/ttvdserver --help` exits cleanly
- [ ] ttvd is a transitive dependency

**Verify:** `nix-build . -A ttvdserver && result/bin/ttvdserver --help`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkgs/python-packages/flasks/ttvd/setup.py", "pkgs/python-packages/flasks/ttvd/default.nix", "pkgs/default.nix"], "verifyCommand": "nix-build . -A ttvdserver && result/bin/ttvdserver --help", "acceptanceCriteria": ["nix-build . -A ttvdserver succeeds", "result/bin/ttvdserver --help exits with usage", "ttvd is a transitive dependency"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Create NixOS module and wire into pc-base.nix
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Define systemd service, nginx proxy, webServices registration for ttvdserver; enable on ATS machines.

**Files:**
- Create: `pkgs/python-packages/flasks/ttvd/module.nix`
- Modify: `pkgs/nixos/pc-base.nix`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] module.nix defines services.ttvdserver options
- [ ] pc-base.nix imports module and enables for isATS
- [ ] TTVD appears in machines.base.webServices config

**Verify:** `grep -n "ttvdserver" pkgs/nixos/pc-base.nix`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkgs/python-packages/flasks/ttvd/module.nix", "pkgs/nixos/pc-base.nix"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n ttvdserver pkgs/nixos/pc-base.nix", "acceptanceCriteria": ["module.nix defines services.ttvdserver options", "pc-base.nix imports module and enables for isATS", "TTVD appears in machines.base.webServices config"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Clean up design doc
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Delete the design spec now that implementation is complete.

**Files:**
- Delete: `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-22-ttvd-ui-design.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] File no longer exists in the repo

**Verify:** `ls docs/superpowers/specs/ | grep ttvd` â†’ no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-22-ttvd-ui-design.md"], "verifyCommand": "ls docs/superpowers/specs/ | grep ttvd", "acceptanceCriteria": ["2026-05-22-ttvd-ui-design.md no longer exists in the repo"]}
```
